name: testAddCompanyWithSameName
description: Error is displayed when trying to create a company with an already existing name
descriptionHtml: Error is displayed when trying to create a company with an already existing name

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click on the 'Create' button and trigger an error
Verify: error message is displayed for duplicate company name
